title: README + CHANGELOG for 0.4.0
description: CHANGELOG 0.4.0 with one line per feature. README updated with dashboard screenshot + new commands. Migration note for 0.3.x users. Mascot in header.

context.text: Updated README and CHANGELOG for unreleased 0.4.0: mascot header, packaged dashboard screenshot, command docs, 0.3.x migration, changelog feature/fix/testing summary. Added package files entries for README assets. Fixed liveUsageProviderDispatch Codex branch test to use deterministic app-server mock instead of spawning real Codex. Gates: npm run build; npm test -- --runInBand (102 suites, 2469 passed, 5 skipped); focused liveUsageProviderDispatch test; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; swift build --package-path macos-menubar/SweechBar; CLI help/link sanity; npm pack --dry-run --json; git diff --check; stub/debug scan. Codex adversarial re-review returned no blockers.
